Afghanistan.notes: Visa is not required in case born in Afghanistan or can proof that one of their parents is a national of Afghanistan or born in Afghanistan.. e-Visa: Visitors must arrive at Kabul International (KBL)..

Argentina.notes: The AVE (High Speed Travel) is open to Moldovan citizens holding valid, current ordinary passports traveling to Argentina for tourism. To do so, they must hold a valid category B2/J/B1/O/P (P1-P2-P3)/E/H-1B visa issued by the United States of America..

Austria.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Azerbaijan.notes: If staying more than 10 days passengers visiting relatives must register with local police. If staying in a hotel, this will be arranged by the hotel.. Azerbaijan bans the entry of people who are of Armenian descent..

Belgium.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Benin.notes: Must have an international vaccination certificate..

Bulgaria.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

China.notes: Visa not required for 30 days for travelling as part of an accredited tour group..

Côte d'Ivoire.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Port Bouet Airport..

Croatia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Cuba.notes: Can be extended up to 90 days with a fee..

Czech Republic.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Denmark.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Estonia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Ethiopia.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Addis Ababa Bole International Airport..

Finland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

France.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Gabon.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Libreville International Airport..

Gambia.notes: In addition to a visa, an entry clearance must be obtained from the Gambian Immigration prior to travel..

Germany.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Greece.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Hungary.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Iceland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Israel.notes: Biometric passport holders only. ETA-IL required..

Italy.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Jordan.notes: Visa can be obtained upon arrival, it will cost a total of 40 JOD, obtainable at most international ports of entry and land border crossings. (except King Hussein/Allenby Bridge ).

Kenya.notes: Applications can be submitted up to 90 days prior to travel and must be submitted at least 3 days in advance.. eTA fee is 32.50 USD.. Proof of reservation at the hotel where visitors plan to stay is required (if staying with friends, an invitation letter is also acceptable).. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries.. Can also be entered on an East Africa Tourist Visa issued by Kenya or Rwanda..

South Korea.notes: Visa-free access for 30 days to Jeju Island..

Laos.notes: 18 of the 33 border crossings are only open to regular visa holders.. e-Visa may be used to enter Laos through the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 3 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges, in Boten (road and railroad ), and in Vientiane (at Khamsavath railway station ).. Visa on arrival is available at the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 4 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges and 7 border crossings..

Latvia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Lebanon.notes: Extendable for 2 additional months.. Granted free of charge at Beirut International Airport or any other port of entry if there is no Israeli visa or seal, holding a telephone number, an address in Lebanon, and a non refundable return or circle trip ticket..

Liechtenstein.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Lithuania.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Luxembourg.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Malta.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Morocco.notes: May apply for an e-Visa if holding a valid visa or a residency document issued by one of the following countries: Schengen Area, Australia, Canada, Ireland, New Zealand, United Kingdom, United States a residency document issued by Cyprus, Japan, United Arab Emirates..

Namibia.notes: Effective from 1 April 2025, Moldovan citizens must apply for a visa on arrival from one of the following points of entry.. Hosea Kutako International Airport, Walvis Bay International Airport, Oshikango Border Post, Trans-Kalahari Border Post, Oranjemund Border Post, Noordover Border Post, Katima Mulilo Border Post, Impalila Island Border Post, Ngoma Border Post and Mohembo Border Post..

Netherlands.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

New Zealand.notes: Diplomatic, service and standard passports with the former USSR symbol issued in Moldova are unacceptable, and visas will not be endorsed in them.. Holders of an Australian Permanent Resident Visa or Resident Return Visa may be granted a New Zealand Resident Visa on arrival permitting indefinite stay (pursuant to the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement ), subject to meeting character requirements and obtaining an Electronic Travel Authority prior to departure..

Norway.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Papua New Guinea.notes: Visitors may apply for a visa online under the "Tourist - Own Itinerary" category..

Philippines.notes: Residents of the United Arab Emirates may obtain an eVisa through the official Philippine eVisa website. A valid Emirati residence visa must be shown upon an eVisa application..

Poland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Portugal.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Romania.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Russia.notes: 90 days within one calendar year period..

Rwanda.notes: Can also be entered on an East Africa Tourist Visa issued by Kenya or Rwanda..

Seychelles.notes: Application can be submitted up to 30 days before travel.. Visitors must upload a reservation confirmation(s) for each visitor's location of stay in Seychelles.. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries.. Payment of the fee (EUR 10) by credit or debit card.. Valid for one journey only and it expires once exit the country..

Slovakia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Slovenia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Solomon Islands.notes: Visa on arrival if having pre-arranged visa..

South Sudan.notes: Obtainable online.. Printed visa authorization must be presented at the time of travel..

Spain.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Suriname.notes: An entrance fee of USD 50 or EUR 50 must be paid online prior to arrival.. Multiple entry e-Visa is also available..

Sweden.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Switzerland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Syria.notes: According to the Law No. 2 of 2014 all visitors require visas prior to arrival. According to the IATA database, visa may be obtained on arrival and is valid for 15 days..

Turkey.notes: ID card valid. 90 days within any 180 day period.

Uganda.notes: Can also be entered on an East Africa Tourist Visa issued by Kenya or Rwanda..

Ukraine.notes: ID-card valid for people living within 30 km (19 mi) border zone.. 90 days within any 180-day period..

Venezuela.notes: Introduction of Electronic Visa System for Tourist and Business Travelers..

Vietnam.notes: e-Visa is valid for 90 days and multiple entry..

Mount Athos.stay: Special permit required (4 days: 25 euro for Orthodox visitors, 35 euro for non-Orthodox visitors, 18 euro for students). There is a visitors' quota: maximum 100 Orthodox and 10 non-Orthodox per day and women are not allowed.

UN Buffer Zone in Cyprus.stay: Access Permit is required for travelling inside the zone, except Civil Use Areas.

Jan Mayen.stay: Permit issued by the local police required for staying for less than 24 hours and permit issued by the Norwegian police for staying for more than 24 hours.

South Ossetia.stay: Multiple entry visa to Russia and three-day prior notification are required to enter South Ossetia.

Eritrea outside Asmara.stay: To travel in the rest of the country, a Travel Permit for Foreigners is required (20 Eritrean nakfa ).

Tristan da Cunha.stay: Permission to land required for 15/30 pounds sterling (yacht/ship passenger) for Tristan da Cunha Island or 20 pounds sterling for Gough Island, Inaccessible Island or Nightingale Islands.

Somaliland.stay: 30 days for 30 USD, payable on arrival.

India PAP/RAP.stay: Protected Area Permit (PAP) required for whole states of Nagaland and Sikkim and parts of states Manipur, Arunachal Pradesh, Uttaranchal, Jammu and Kashmir, Rajasthan, Himachal Pradesh. Restricted Area Permit (RAP) required for all of Andaman and Nicobar Islands and parts of Sikkim. Some of these requirements are occasionally lifted for a year.

Kish Island.stay: Visitors to Kish Island do not require a visa.

North Korea outside Pyongyang.stay: People are not allowed to leave the capital city, tourists can only leave the capital with a governmental tourist guide (no independent moving)

Palestine.stay: Arrival by sea to Gaza Strip not allowed.

Gorno-Badakhshan Autonomous Province.stay: OIVR permit required (15+5 Tajikistani Somoni ) and another special permit (free of charge) is required for Lake Sarez.

French West Indies.stay: French West Indies refers to Martinique, Guadeloupe, Saint Martin and Saint Barthélemy.

Pitcairn Islands.stay: 14 days visa free and landing fee US$35 or tax of US$5 if not going ashore.

United States Minor Outlying Islands.stay: Special permits required for Baker Island, Howland Island, Jarvis Island, Johnston Atoll, Kingman Reef, Midway Atoll, Palmyra Atoll and Wake Island.

South Georgia and the South Sandwich Isl.stay: Pre-arrival permit from the Commissioner required (72 hours/1 month for 110/160 pounds sterling ).
